backend/main.mo: Main backend actor that includes blob storage mixin and provides CRUD operations for audio recordings, storing them with class labels (2-7) and external blob references in a Map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: audio recording, playback, settings page, and visual theme design, with high confidence and mapped test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React files describing routing, components, hooks, and styling for the audio recording application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining OKLCH color system for light and dark modes, including recording/playback theme colors and sidebar styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, page title 'Reading Recorder', and script reference to main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with three routes (recording, playback, settings) under a shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header navigation (Record, Playback, Settings), main content outlet, and footer with Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/PlaybackControls: Audio playback UI component with play/pause button, seek slider, time display, and recording metadata using the useAudioPlayer hook.
frontend/src/components/RecordingInterfa: Recording interface with class selector (2-7), animated record/stop button, duration timer, upload progress bar, and success/error alerts; converts audio blob to properly typed Uint8Array for ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/RecordingsList.t: Displays a tabbed list of audio recordings filtered by class label, with selection and deletion capabilities. Uses alert dialog for delete confirmation and highlights the currently selected recording.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance with authentication, creating anonymous or authenticated actors based on Internet Identity state. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayer.ts: Provides audio playback controls (play, pause, seek) for ExternalBlob audio sources. Manages playback state, duration tracking, and applies user-configured playback speed.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioRecorder.ts: Handles browser-based audio recording using MediaRecorder API with configurable bitrate. Returns recording state, duration timer, and methods to start/stop recording that produce Uint8Array audio data.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality and identity state management. Creates and manages AuthClient with configurable options and delegation handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on recordings: fetching all recordings, filtering by class, creating new recordings, and deleting recordings. Automatically invalidates cache on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Manages user settings (bitrate, sample rate, playback speed, etc.) with localStorage persistence. Provides methods to update individual settings or reset to defaults.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color palette using oklch color space for light and dark themes. Includes specialized colors for recording and playback states.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/PlaybackPage.tsx: Page component displaying a two-column layout with a recordings list and playback controls panel. Manages selected recording state for playback.
frontend/src/pages/RecordingPage.tsx: Simple page component that renders the RecordingInterface component with a centered layout and descriptive header.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page component that provides UI controls for configuring recording quality (bitrate, sample rate), storage options (auto-delete, max storage), and playback settings (speed, skip silence) using a custom useSettings hook.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, typography settings with Inter font, container configurations, and custom theme extensions for a recording/reading application UI.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting a "Reading Recorder" app with implemented features for audio recording, playback, settings, and visual theming, plus pending backend tasks for 2/7 class structure and data storage.
